title: Add M3 save replay resume harness
summary: Add focused save/load/resume diagnostics for the M3 ordinary-life scenario without public save compatibility or platform save UI.
acceptance: M3 interrupt save load resume matches uninterrupted replay for the same seed command stream and checkpoint ticks
Load validates versions owner handles integer lanes sorted records scenario id and section versions before mutating target stores
Derived indexes WorkOffers reservations path caches ability caches mood/social read models and weather projections rebuild from owner state before resumed ticks
Diagnostics name seed scenario first divergent tick checkpoint hashes and artifact paths on failure
No platform save UI public save compatibility promise schema migration codec dependency or broad save container change is introduced

history.details: Created by WM-0045 M3 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

objective: Gate M3 ordinary-life state through deterministic focused save/replay before Worker parity and benchmarks.
forbiddenPaths: public save compatibility promise beyond the focused M3 harness
schema migration or codec dependency changes
M4 lamp Chronicle anomaly crisis-chain or director implementation
benchmarkImpact: Records save size rebuild time rebuilt index counts checkpoint hashes and divergence diagnostics; baseline updates wait for WM-0059.
reviewRouting: Simulation-engineer completes to reviewer; systems-architect must block any save-format or migration scope expansion.
rollbackModel: Revert focused M3 save/replay harness while preserving M1 and M2 save/replay behavior.
ownerGate: Rebuild all derived indexes from owner state
Keep focused harness separate from public save compatibility
Block on platform save UI schema codec dependency or M4 scope

sparkEligibility.reason: Save/replay and migration-boundary work is explicitly outside Spark scope.
